title: 缺席的敲钟人：马斯克如何用叙事构建一个2.1万亿美元的操作系统
brief: A WeChat cover illustration showing two contrasting scenes side by side: On left, NASDAQ stock exchange with people cheering around a bell; on right, Elon Musk standing alone at Starship launchpad in Boca Chica. In the background, a faint Mars planet visible in the sky. Style: cinematic-editorial, atmospheric, with warm/cold color contrast between the two scenes.
prompt:
Create an illustration titled '缺席的敲钟人：马斯克如何用叙事构建一个2.1万亿美元的操作系统'. Style: cinematic editorial still, dramatic but natural lighting, grounded scene details, documentary-like framing with an illustrative finish, no text labels, no diagrams. This is for an article or essay — not a technical document. Do NOT add any diagrams, arrows, labels, callouts, or text. Focus on a concrete visual idea with atmosphere, restraint, and editorial clarity. This is a WeChat Official Account headline cover image (公众号头条封面). Compose for a 2.35:1 ultra-wide crop (1080x460). Keep key subjects centered or in the bottom third — top area will be cropped. Design for readability as a small thumbnail in WeChat's subscription feed. Title text will be overlaid by the editor, so leave ample negative space. Language/region: zh. Target aspect ratio: wechat-cover-hd. Mode: text-only. Brief:
A WeChat cover illustration showing two contrasting scenes side by side: On left, NASDAQ stock exchange with people cheering around a bell; on right, Elon Musk standing alone at Starship launchpad in Boca Chica. In the background, a faint Mars planet visible in the sky. Style: cinematic-editorial, atmospheric, with warm/cold color contrast between the two scenes.
